Files changed:

- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/no-name-proj/backend/src/modules/github/github-backfill.service.ts` — new service that queries repos by installation and enqueues `backfill_repo` jobs with exponential backoff
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/no-name-proj/backend/src/modules/github/github-event.processor.ts` — added `IBackfillRepoJob` interface, `GithubAppService` + `HttpService` constructor injection, backfill job routing in `process()`, and four private methods (`handleBackfillRepo`, `backfillCommits`, `backfillPullRequests`, `backfillPrReviews`, `backfillPrReviewComments`)
